name: Meng Ya

skills.name: Fiery Temper
skills.description:
Cooldown is reduced when Attack Speed is increased.
Gains Anger when Basic Attack and Skill 1 hit targets. At max Anger, becomes Excited, enhancing all skills. While Excited, surplus Anger restores Health.

skills.name: Awesome Barrage
skills.description:
Uses the Apocalyptor to strafe continuously and deal damage.
Excited: Bullets have a piercing effect, dealing half damage to subsequent enemies.

skills.name: Heavy Shot
skills.description:
Shoots a heavy round in the target direction, inflicting damage and slow. Upon hitting an obstacle or reaching its max range, it will split into splinters that deal damage.
Excited: Increases the number of splinters.

skills.name: Missile Mayhem
skills.description:
Scans the vicinity and fires missiles at enemies within range who are attacked by teammates, dealing damage.
Excited: Reduces interval between missiles.

skillsZh.name: 熾熱渾天
skillsZh.description:
攻速提升時冷卻獲得提升。
普攻和1技能命中目標時增加熾怒值，滿值時進入興奮狀態，強化所有技能。溢出的熾怒值會回復自身生命值。

skillsZh.name: 狂轟火線
skillsZh.description:
使用「渾天」持續掃射，造成傷害。
興奮狀態：子彈具備貫穿效果，對後續敵人傷害減半。

skillsZh.name: 爆裂重砲
skillsZh.description:
朝指定方向發射重砲，對敵人造成傷害和減速，碰到阻擋或飛行結束時會分裂霰彈，對敵人造成傷害。
興奮狀態：增加分裂霰彈數量。

skillsZh.name: 飛彈援襲
skillsZh.description:
探索周圍環境，對範圍內受到友軍傷害的敵人發射導彈，對其造成傷害。
興奮狀態：減少導彈發射間隔時間。

tips: Meng Ya (Marksman): Tier B — 53.82% WR (Camp HOK).
Build: Sparkforged Dagger, Boots of Dexterity, Doomsday.
tipsZh: 蒙犽（發育路）：梯度 B，勝率 53.82%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：閃電匕首、急速戰靴、末世.

faqs.question: Is Meng Ya good in current season?
faqs.answer: Meng Ya is Tier B Marksman with 53.82% win rate, 0.57% pick rate, and 0.01% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Meng Ya build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Sparkforged Dagger, Boots of Dexterity, Doomsday, Deepfrost Siege, Daybreaker's Virtue, Overlord's Might.

faqs.question: How to counter Meng Ya?
faqs.answer: Pick Liu Bang. Strong into Mai Shiranui, Pei, Diaochan.

faqsZh.question: 蒙犽 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 蒙犽 為 B 梯度，勝率 53.82%、選取 0.57%、禁用 0.01%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 蒙犽 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：閃電匕首、急速戰靴、末世、寒霜襲侵、仁者破曉、強者破軍.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 蒙犽？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Liu Bang。蒙犽 克制 Mai Shiranui、Pei、Diaochan。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Mai Shiranui, Pei, Diaochan. Weak into: Liu Bang.

guide.overview: Meng Ya is a Medium Marksman (Farm Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier B with 53.6% win rate and 0.4% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Meng Ya: Cooldown is reduced when Attack Speed is increased.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Eternity Blade, Boots of Resistance, Daybreaker's Virtue, then complete Shadow Ripper, Cuirass of Savagery. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Cataclysm for stats that match Meng Ya's Marksman kit. Take Haste & Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Awesome Barrage → Heavy Shot → Missile Mayhem → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 1 → Skill 2 → Missile Mayhem (max Skill 1 first)
skillOrder.reason: Awesome Barrage is your lane trade tool. Heavy Shot second. Missile Mayhem whenever available.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Awesome Barrage → Heavy Shot → Missile Mayhem → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Farm Lane skirmish or objective fight

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Last-hit safely until first core item. Ping jungler for river vision; never face-check brush without minion cover.
guide.teamfight: Position behind frontline; attack closest safe target. Join fight only after enemy dive cooldowns are used.
guide.highRank: Meng Ya sits at Tier B globally (53.6% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick. Camp data shows above-average win rate — prioritize when not hard-countered in draft.
comparisons: Meng Ya vs Hou Yi (Marksman, Tier S+): Hou Yi is 2.9% pick / 49.3% WR. Meng Ya has +4.3% WR vs Hou Yi in Camp data. Choose Meng Ya when you need Farm Lane identity; choose Hou Yi for Farm Lane comfort.

Meng Ya vs Marco Polo (Marksman, Tier S+): Marco Polo is 2.1% pick / 50.1% WR. Meng Ya has +3.5% WR vs Marco Polo in Camp data. Choose Meng Ya when you need Farm Lane identity; choose Marco Polo for Farm Lane comfort.

matchups.summary: Meng Ya excels into Mai Shiranui, Pei, Diaochan. Avoid blind picking into Liu Bang, Lapulapu, Ata without team peel.
